svg.title: Agent security separates dangerous capability combinations
svg.desc: D2 generated diagram for Agent security separates dangerous capability combinations
svg.text: Agent security separates dangerous capability combinations
Do not combine private data, untrusted content, and external communication in one execution path.

text.tspan: separate read tools from sending tools

g.text: Check: can this agent read internal data, see attacker-controlled content, and send data outside?
